@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "backstage-18422-bug-report-createunifiedtheme-does-not-allow-overrides-for-backs",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "backstage: 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides for Backstage components",
+    "description": "🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides for Backstage components. This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify backstage troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your backstage installation:\n```bash\nnpx backstage-cli info\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review backstage configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant backstage configuration:\n### 📜 Description\n\nNeither the v4 nor the v5 Theme currently supports overrides for non Material-UI components when created via the new createUnifiedTheme"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow overrides…",
+        "description": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\r\n\n#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist\n```yaml\nexport const lightThemeNew = createTheme({\n  ...lightTheme,\n  defaultPageTheme: 'home',\n  pageTheme: newPageTheme,\n});\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm 🐛 Bug Report: createUnifiedTheme does not allow… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest backstage to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!\r\n\n#### :heavy_check_mark: Checklist",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "export const lightThemeNew = createTheme({\n  ...lightTheme,\n  defaultPageTheme: 'home',\n  pageTheme: newPageTheme,\n});",
+        "export const unifiedLightTheme = createUnifiedTheme({\n  palette: palettes.light,\n  defaultPageTheme: 'home',\n  pageTheme: newPageTheme,\n});",
+        "<ThemeProvider theme={unifiedLightTheme.getTheme('v4')}>\n      <CssBaseline>{children}</CssBaseline>\n</ThemeProvider>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "backstage",
+      "incubating",
